subparts.text: What are the characteristics of an embedded system?
What are the major application areas of embedded systems?
How are General Purpose Processors different from Application Specific Instruction Set Processors?
What are PLDs? Explain their advantages.
What is a hard real-time system? How is it different from a soft real-time system?
Draw and explain the memory organization of a process.
Explain asynchronous serial communication in detail. Give an example.
What are edge-triggered and level-triggered interrupts?

questions.question_text: Explain the embedded systems design process. What are the major levels of abstraction in the design process?
How are embedded systems classified? Explain in detail.
Draw and explain the architectural difference between Harvard and Von Neumann processors.
Explain the different types of memory. What are the different factors required to be considered while selecting memory devices?
Draw and explain the architecture of an Operating System. What is an RTOS? Why is it required?
What are the different factors that are needed to be analyzed for selecting an RTOS?
Draw and explain the frame structure of UART and HDLC.
What are RS-232 handshaking signals? Explain RS-232 handshaking in detail.
